DO.action: Turn on / increase aeration immediately. Keep DO above 3 mg/L to prevent hypoxia. Skip next feeding.
DO.source: Ott et al. 2024; ScienceDirect aeration study 2022

turbidity.action: Do a 20-30% partial water change and reduce feeding. Overfeeding is the main ammonia/waste source.
turbidity.source: Yu et al. 2018; Ramli et al. 2024

pH.action: If low: add alkaline buffer (also raises hardness). If high: partial water change. Target pH 7.0-8.5.
pH.source: UF/IFAS Water Quality Guide; Zeng et al. 2024

temp.action: Add shade cover, increase water exchange, boost aeration (warm water holds less oxygen). Target 25-31 C.

waterLevel.action: Top up or drain to restore normal level. Low level concentrates waste and raises stocking stress.
